raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year>, I ordered a coat from XXXX, I received the item and returned it on XX/XX/year> order # XXXX, the shipping # XXXX XXXX. On XX/XX/year>, I have received an email from XXXX stating that the item has been received and to allow 10 business days for the return to be completed. I have waited two weeks and still haven't received a refund, the merchant did not provide any information regarding how much longer it would take for the refund to be processed. I went ahead and opened a dispute with Citi bank on XX/XX/year>. I provided Citi with the screenshot of the email confirming that the item has been received by the merchant, I provided a shipping confirmation that the item was delivered to the warehouse with the signature of their employee. On XX/XX/year>, Citi Bank issued a letter stating that they completed investigation and that I am still responsible due to the fact that the merchandise is in my possession as it was claimed by XXXX. They are stating that they did not receive proof even though I provided it to them multiple times.
